Introduction.Background: This Detailed Diagnostic Report is prepared for the inspection of a flat to identify sources of leakage, dampness, and structural defects, and provide recommendations for remediation.
Introduction.Objective: To identify sources of leakage, dampness, and structural defects within the inspected property and to provide actionable recommendations for their repair and prevention.
Introduction.Scope_of_Work: The inspection covered various areas including the Hall, Bedroom, Kitchen, Master Bedroom, Parking Area, and Common Bathroom.
Introduction.Tools_Used: GTC 400 C Professional Thermal Camera, Moisture Meter, Visual Inspection

Impacted_Areas.Area: Master bedroom, External wall and Duct
Impacted_Areas.Positive_Side_Inputs: External wall crack and Duct Issue
Common Bathroom tile hollowness and plumbing issue
Flat no 203 tile joint open and outlet Leakage

Final_Summary_Table.Observed_Issue: Observed dampness at the skirting level of Hall of Flat No. 103
Final_Summary_Table.Probable_Cause: Observed gaps between the tile joints of Common Bathroom of Flat No. 103
Final_Summary_Table.Suggested_Remedy: Thorough cleaning and epoxy injection grouting of existing tile joints in Common Bathroom of Flat No. 103.

Final_Summary_Table.Observed_Issue: Observed dampness at the skirting level of the Common Bedroom of Flat No. 103
Final_Summary_Table.Probable_Cause: Observed gaps between the tile joints of Common Bathroom of Flat No. 103
Final_Summary_Table.Suggested_Remedy: Thorough cleaning and epoxy injection grouting of existing tile joints in Common Bathroom of Flat No. 103.

Final_Summary_Table.Observed_Issue: Observed dampness at the skirting level of Master Bedroom of Flat No. 103
Final_Summary_Table.Probable_Cause: Observed gaps between the tile joints of Master Bedroom Bathroom of Flat No. 103
Final_Summary_Table.Suggested_Remedy: Thorough cleaning and epoxy injection grouting of existing tile joints in Master Bedroom Bathroom of Flat No. 103.

Final_Summary_Table.Observed_Issue: Observed dampness at the skirting level of Kitchen of Flat No. 103
Final_Summary_Table.Probable_Cause: Observed gaps between the tile joints of Master Bedroom Bathroom of Flat No. 103
Final_Summary_Table.Suggested_Remedy: Thorough cleaning and epoxy injection grouting of existing tile joints in Master Bedroom Bathroom of Flat No. 103.

Final_Summary_Table.Observed_Issue: Observed dampness & efflorescence on the wall surface of Master Bedroom of Flat No. 103
Final_Summary_Table.Probable_Cause: Observed cracks on the External wall of building near Master Bedroom of Flat No. 103
Final_Summary_Table.Suggested_Remedy: Repair external wall cracks near Master Bedroom of Flat No. 103 with polyurethane sealant, followed by replastering and repainting the impacted internal wall surface.

Final_Summary_Table.Observed_Issue: Observed leakage at the Parking ceiling below Flat No. 103
Final_Summary_Table.Probable_Cause: Observed plumbing issue & gaps between the tile joints of Common Bathroom of Flat No. 103
Final_Summary_Table.Suggested_Remedy: Conduct leak detection for concealed plumbing in Common Bathroom of Flat No. 103, repair any identified leaks, and perform epoxy injection grouting of tile joints. Repair ceiling plaster in parking area.

Final_Summary_Table.Observed_Issue: Observed mild dampness at the ceiling of Common Bathroom of Flat No. 103
Final_Summary_Table.Probable_Cause: Observed gap between tile joints of Common & Master Bedroom Bathrooms of Flat No. 203.
Final_Summary_Table.Suggested_Remedy: Thorough cleaning and epoxy injection grouting of existing tile joints in Common & Master Bedroom Bathrooms of Flat No. 203.

Overall_Recommendations: Undertake epoxy injection grouting of all tile joints in the Common Bathroom and Master Bedroom Bathroom of Flat No. 103 to address identified tile hollowness and gaps, preventing further seepage to adjacent areas.
Investigate and repair concealed plumbing issues in the Common Bathroom of Flat No. 103, which is a probable cause for leakage at the parking ceiling below.
Implement external wall crack repair using polyurethane sealant near the Master Bedroom of Flat No. 103 to prevent water ingress and recurring dampness.
Address the identified gaps in tile joints and potential outlet leakages in the Common & Master Bedroom Bathrooms of Flat No. 203, as these are contributing to ceiling dampness in Flat No. 103.
Consider a comprehensive internal wall treatment, including re-plastering and repainting, for all areas affected by dampness and efflorescence after source repairs are completed.
